title: eriogonum umbellatum var. subaridum
intro: Eriogonum umbellatum var. subaridum, also known as sulphur flower buckwheat, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the sulphur flower buckwheat plant. This plant is known for its bright yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum umbellatum var. subaridum include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and promoting tissue repair. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to promote wound healing and internally to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system.
